text.name: sysdescription
text.text: The ColecoVision is a second generation (1976–1992) home video game console developed and distributed by Coleco Industries. It was released in August 1982 in North America at a retail price of $175. The console was later released in Europe (1983). The ColecoVision offered a closer experience to arcade games than its competitors at the time. The console was discontinued in mid-1985.

text.name: sysdescription
text.text: La ColecoVision es una videoconsola doméstica de segunda generación (1976-1992) desarrollada y distribuida por Coleco Industries. Salió a la venta en agosto de 1982 en Norteamérica a un precio de 175 dólares. La consola se lanzó posteriormente en Europa (1983). La ColecoVision ofrecía una experiencia más cercana a los juegos arcade que sus competidoras de la época. La consola dejó de fabricarse a mediados de 1985.
